scenes.title: Warm Grey Curved-Brim Cap on Kathmandu Rooftop
scenes.visual_description: Start tighter on the cap texture and front embroidery, keeping the rooftop softly blurred.
scenes.camera: Slow dolly-in from the front of the subject towards the camera, then back out again for continuity
scenes.lighting: Soft natural lighting with a slight ambient glow from the sun reflecting off the cap and the cityscape
scenes.subject_action: Model holds still; no hand crosses the logo area.
continuity_anchors: same warm grey curved-brim cap colour throughout
same logo shape and placement throughout
preserve warm grey curved-brim cap colour

final_prompt: 9:16 6-second Facebook Reel video. Objective: Make a premium Facebook Reel ad for a warm grey curved-brim cap on a Kathmandu rooftop. Hero subject: warm grey curved-brim cap; lock its colour, shape, logo/mark placement, material feel, and readable details throughout. Visual style: Luxury Natural commercial realism for young urban Nepalese consumers. World: Kathmandu rooftop, aspirational urban lifestyle. Camera: slow stable dolly-in with no shake; 35mm lens; clean product-first framing. Lighting: soft natural directional light with muted neutral colour grade. Motion: one controlled subject action only; avoid crossing hands over key logo/details. Continuity: same subject identity, same lighting direction, same background layout, no flicker. Preferred patterns: slow dolly-in, muted neutral colour grade, premium product close-up. Hard constraints: preserve warm grey curved-brim cap colour; preserve logo shape and placement; Avoid shaky camera; Avoid cartoonish visuals; Avoid over-saturated colours; Avoid distorted logos. Scene plan: Scene 1: Start tighter on the cap texture and front embroidery, keeping the rooftop softly blurred. Camera: Slow dolly-in from the front of the subject towards the camera, then back out again for continuity. Motion: Smooth, slow motion. Lighting: Soft natural lighting with a slight ambient glow from the sun reflecting off the cap and the cityscape. Scene 2: The warm grey curved-brim cap is shown again from a slightly different angle, emphasizing its shape and texture. The camera then pans out to show the entire scene with more detail. Camera: Slow dolly-in from the front of the subject towards the camera, then back out for continuity. Motion: Smooth, slow motion. Lighting: Soft natural lighting with a slight ambient glow from the sun reflecting off the cap and the cityscape. Negative constraints: Avoid shaky camera, Avoid cartoonish visuals, Avoid over-saturated colours, Avoid distorted logos, Avoid random text appearing in video.
